# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: FunctionApp
    type: Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker
    location: <location>
    properties:
      storageConnectionString: SecretManagerReference('<storage_connection_string_name>')
      appInsightsConnectionString: SecretManagerReference('<app_insights_connection_string_name>')
      managedIdentity:
        enabled: true
        identityUrl: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/<identity_name>
      environmentVariables:
        STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING: SecretManagerReference('<storage_connection_string_name>')
        KEY_VAULT_URL: SecretManagerReference('<key_vault_url_name>')
        SQL_CONNECTION_STRING: SecretManagerReference('<sql_connection_string_name>')
        COSMOS_DB_CONNECTION_STRING: SecretManagerReference('<cosmos_db_connection_string_name>')

  - name: <identity_name>
    type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity.UserAssigned
    location: <location>
    properties:
      roles:
        - name: StorageFullControl
          scope: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/<storage_account_name>
        - name: KeyVaultReader
          scope: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/<key_vault_name>
        - name: SqlAdmin
          scope: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/<sql_server_name>/databases/<sql_database_name>
        - name: CosmosDBDataWriter
          scope: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDb/databaseAccounts/<cosmos_db_account_name>/database/dbs/<cosmos_db_database_name>/colls/<cosmos_db_collection_name>

outputs:
  - name: FunctionAppARM
    type: Microsoft.ARM.Template.Outputs.Artifact
    value: ${{ resourceGroup().templateUri }}
